title: hypericum tomentosum
intro: Hypericum tomentosum, also known as woolly St. John's Wort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the St. John's Wort family. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Hypericum tomentosum include its ability to treat wounds, reduce pain and swelling, and alleviate anxiety and depression. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be made by infusing the plant's leaves and stems in hot water or oil.
